{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323202421F08227054AAC08CFD47E"}"},"total":728},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611193939158893374","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这个小说戾气不重，然后还能参与一点点四合院的故事，是有点爽文的感觉，里面写的那些苏造肉啊，雪里藏棉啊什么的，看起来感觉好好吃。有点美食节目的感觉。","text_exts":[{"e":21,"s":18,"text":"四合院","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177426866108CFD47E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227611193939158893374%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227597469352450870297%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772122450,"group_id":"7597469352450870297","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4W8jcRRpxObZ8DdYXLyx/A=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/90cfcdea8b814cb2a15a05cb598a23f2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795506&x-signature=YfKqkzkkLwrbCyRv9pCRRhQYN40%3D","user_id":"75207178977371","user_name":"文武财神都是财神"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"75207178977371","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7597469352450870297","book_info":{"abstract":"《新书，评分刚出》《不收秦》《不碰娄》《无戾气》
别人穿越四合院忙着斗极品、抓机遇，沈砚只想当条咸鱼：副食品店的糕点师傅，活儿少事不多，下班揣着空间里的私房点心，往院门口一坐，嗑着瓜子看邻居们上演‘家长里短大戏’。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/000b098c0a7b81986ca53656d705d060","author":"番茄妙妙妙脆角","author_id":"","book_id":"7597469352450870297","book_name":"四合院里摸鱼的糕点师傅","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#483828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"30.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":495,"name":"四合院","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=495&name=四合院&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7599489776487514649","read_count":"307992","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"330778"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"144","tags":"男频衍生,穿越,美食,四合院,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1de7f3d79a8ff4db5e083f8143e27681~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779452661&x-signature=t2pp2AHxCDeFc3TB6Vop7fZ57eM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"496605678541997","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"73"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323202421F08227054AAC08CFD47E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_t ext":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":19,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8113,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":23746},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610508194691515161","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者节奏控制的很好，切入点特别新，是建国前，之前没见过这个角度。男主做事有章程、有分寸，目前特别喜欢，期待更新！
白案师傅，这个职业很附和主角原来网红的身份和旧时代对面点大师傅的尊敬，协调的特别好。
小小的金手指，不显得虚假，反而有一点爽，出现的篇幅不多，没有水字数，喜欢！
对四合院的处理上，也很好看，既有话语权，又不过分掺和，没有全是麻烦的糟心事，全是对自己生活经营上的爽感！！！！
在外交餐饮上，很有大局观，开头惊喜，过程有打脸，成果新颖，结尾有大局观，算是为国争光了！喜欢！
